mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diet_record (user_id, meal_type, record_date, total_calories, total_protein, total_fat, total_carb, remark) VALUES (#{userId}, #{mealType}, #{recordDate}, #{totalCalories}, #{totalProtein}, #{totalFat}, #{totalCarb}, #{remark})

INSERT INTO diet_record_item (diet_record_id, food_item_id, food_name, intake_gram, calories, protein, fat, carb) VALUES
(#{item.dietRecordId}, #{item.foodItemId}, #{item.foodName}, #{item.intakeGram}, #{item.calories}, #{item.protein}, #{item.fat}, #{item.carb})
